topic: My mailbox keeps getting letters addressed to me from me postmarked next year
title: My Mailbox Keeps Getting Letters Addressed to Me, From Me, Postmarked Next Year | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My mailbox keeps getting letters addressed to me. The return address is also me. Postmarked next year.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand holding an envelope at a mailbox, a handwritten address visible, dim evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Suburban street. I check the mail each evening. I live alone.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a suburban street at dusk, a row of mailboxes, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of bills and flyers in an open mailbox, dim evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One envelope had my name twice. Sender and receiver. A date next March on the stamp.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an envelope showing the same name as sender and receiver, a future date on the postmark, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of hands opening a sealed envelope, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My handwriting. It described my day, down to the coffee I spilled.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a handwritten letter describing a day, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a letter burning in a metal sink, a faint flame, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next day, another. Tomorrow's date. Tomorrow's news, exactly right.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of another identical envelope in a mailbox, a near future postmark, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each letter is from further ahead, and they warn me. Stay out of the basement. Do not answer Friday.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a handwritten warning on a letter, underlined words, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night's letter was dated the day I die. It begged me to mail it back unopened.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a folded letter on a table with a stark date written at the top, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I did not mail it. I locked it in a drawer.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a letter locked in a wooden desk drawer, a small key in the lock, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning the drawer was open. The letter was gone. There is a stamp on my hand.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an open empty desk drawer, and a postage stamp stuck to the back of a hand, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
